name: Rose Hips
summary: They are best framed as polyphenol- and vitamin-rich fruit material with modest but relevant human evidence.
description: They are best framed as polyphenol- and vitamin-rich fruit material with modest but relevant human evidence.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: iron overload disorders with high vitamin C intake
caution with anticoagulants if high-dose vitamin C/polyphenol products.
interactions: caution with anticoagulants if high-dose vitamin C/polyphenol products.

sources.title: Phytochemistry, Traditional Uses and Pharmacological Profile of Rose Hip: A Review
Therapeutic Applications of Rose Hips from Different Rosa Species
A Comprehensive Review on Phytochemistry and Pharmacology of Rosa Species (Rosaceae)

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Fruit/hip tea and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Fruit/hip tea and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
